title: Team-member closeout: Mistbound Hiding Threshold (0e27cc) — boundary-scoped synthesis at session retirement; sole-marshal duty span 21:08Z 2026-05-24 → 05:47Z 2026-05-25; 10 cycles landed; marshal seat handed to Hushed Stalking Shade
body: Team-member closeout — Mistbound Hiding Threshold / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 0e27cc per session-handoff SKILL Team Member, Not Closeout Owner. - Boundary owned: Sole commit marshal across compaction-5 resume through retirement. Duty span ~8h35min (21:08Z 2026-05-24 → 05:47Z 2026-05-25). Also: branch-fitness plan author (current/branch-fitness-and-push-cadence.plan.md; 16-cycle revised structure; 11 reviewer-driven revisions applied; uncommitted in working tree). - Outcome: 10 commits landed under marshal duty: 4575044e (Cycle 2), e8ca6d08 (Cycle 3), b7ac9938 (Cycle 4), 7c2f85f4 (Cycle 5), e8bc6781 (Cycle 5a), 9725ae09 (Cycle 6), 93c4fdc0 (held-items), 48c8ac22 (Cycle 7), 75a2cd25 (Cycle 7.1), 9e57290d (Cycle 8). Cycle 8a (ADR-187) intent 7e965431 abandoned by me at 23:26Z on husky-format-failure; substantive work preserved in working tree for Hushed to pick up under new author identity. - Evidence: handoff record .agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/2026-05-25-mistbound-to-hushed-stalking-shade-marshal-handoff.md; Moment 1 broadcast e2a21c5d; Moment 2 ack from Hushed at 05:46Z; heartbeat-end at 05:47:08Z. - Claims/queue/git state: ZERO active claims under Mistbound. ZERO Mistbound-owned queued intents. HEAD 9e57290d (Cycle 8 last landing). - Heartbeat-end broadcast emitted: yes at 05:47:08Z (event landed in stream). - Retained claims: NONE. Hushed inherits sole-marshal seat unchanged. - Pickup notification required: Hushed's Moment 2 broadcast confirms seat assumption + 3 monitors live + heartbeat cron live. No further pickup needed. - Surprise or changed understanding (5): (1) Branch-fitness plan was authored cleanly + reviewed by 4 specialists but never marshal-committed — preserved as ?? in working tree; pickup awaits owner direction on plan promotion. (2) Two false-positive retirement-detections fired on me this session (Seaworthy 21:57Z + Lunar 22:57Z) — both during marshal-cycle silent windows when work-evidence existed in git log; Director cure-discipline (cross-ref git log before escalation) named at 22:58Z + 23:01Z. (3) Marshal-side format recovery from pnpm format:root is FORBIDDEN — Cycle 7 + 8a both demonstrated prettier mangles multi-line inline-code spans into broken markdown; better protocol is DM author for re-author. (4) Platform-wide cron-drift event 23:28-23:46Z hit Lunar + Misty + likely Mistbound — Monitor primitive degradation cause unknown; recovery requires manual TaskStop + restart. (5) Owner direction supremacy demonstrated three times: M1-Pause single-bundle override; sole-marshal binding 'mistbound commits, not anyone else'; pause-then-reversal 'no pause, full speed ahead, complete the tidy plan'. - Blockers or risks: Cycle 8a intent requires fresh substantive-author identity (Misty stood down 00:34Z) to re-enqueue with sub-100-char subject AND author-side format pass. - Handoff needed: NO from Mistbound — sole-marshal seat handed to Hushed; PDR-064 protocol observed end-to-end. Session-handoff for retirement follows immediately. — Mistbound Hiding Threshold / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 0e27cc (retiring at 05:47Z)
